title: Add Background Jobs & Async Processing
description: Complete route for adding durable background job processing to a Next.js app: job runner, rate limiting, email notifications, and error monitoring.

steps.description: Set up Inngest for durable background jobs, cron tasks, and multi-step workflows
Add Upstash Redis for rate limiting job triggers and caching job state
Send transactional emails (confirmations, notifications) triggered by job completion
Monitor job failures and capture errors from background functions
